# GiraffeCAD

This repo contains both the GiraffeCAD library (`code_goes_here/`) and example timber frame designs (`examples/`).

- For rules on **authoring the library**, see `.github/instructions/authoring.instructions.md` (auto-applied to `code_goes_here/**` and `tests/**`).
- For rules on **writing timber frame designs** with the API, see `.github/instructions/usage.instructions.md` (auto-applied to `examples/**`).

Always use SymPy `Rational` for all numeric values — never Python floats.
